nasb.text: Malchijah the son of Harim and Hasshub the son of Pahath-moab repaired another section and the Tower of Furnaces.

esv.text: Malchijah the son of Harim and Hasshub the son of Pahath-moab repaired another section and the Tower of the Ovens.

cnv.text: 哈琳的兒子瑪基雅和巴哈．摩押的兒子哈述修築另一段城牆和爐樓。

ccb.text: 哈琳的儿子玛基雅和巴哈·摩押的儿子哈述修筑另一段城墙，包括炉楼。
